enable2d10.label: Use 2d10 system
enable2d10.hint: Changes all standard checks (attack, save, skill, etc.) to use 2d10 instead of 1d20

overrideInitiative.label: Override initiative custom
overrideInitiative.hint: Initiative modifier now becomes (DEX + WIS) by default

enableChatMessage.label: Mana point message recipients
enableChatMessage.hint: Select whom to send successful or failed mana point usage messages to

enableModule.label: Enable Mana Module.
enableModule.hint: Enables or disables mana for casting spells. This will override the slot cost for player tokens.

replaceSpellSlotOption.label: Replace spell slot option
replaceSpellSlotOption.hint: Removes the option to use spell slots from the spell activation dialog. Mana is the only option available.

resourceName.label: Mana Resource.
resourceName.hint: This is the name of the resource on the Player Character Sheet that represents the mana (default: Mana).

gmOnlyOverride.label: Only the GM is allowed to edit the Mana Point Item.
gmOnlyOverride.hint: Unchecking this allows every player to override the Mana item from their character sheet.

actor.alreadySpItemOwned: There is already a mana point item on this character. Please remove the duplicate.
actor.manaItemUpdated: Found '{ManaPoints}' on {Actor} character sheet! Your Maximum {ManaPoints} have been updated from {PrevManaPoints} to {NewManaPoints}.
actor.noManaItemMessage: {ActorName} doesn't have any resource named {ManaPoints}. Please add a 'Class Feature' Item '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell. (Item ID: {ManaItem})
actor.notEnoughMana: {ActorName} doesn't have enough {ManaPoints} to cast this spell.
actor.pleaseCreateManaItem: Please add an Item '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell. (Item ID: {ManaItem})
actor.notEnoughManaMessage: You don't have enough '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell.

autoCalculate.label: Enable Automatic Mana Points Progression.
autoCalculate.hint: Enable this setting if you want the module to do the math for you every time a player character advances in a class level or gains a new class.

costs.sectionHint: You don't need to change the mana point costs if you are using the default mana point rules in DMG (page 288). You can use formulas to determine the cost.

leveledProgression.enableHint: If you need calculation on NPC remeber that this setting won't work for casters NPCs since they have no class nor caster level in Foundry. If you want some kind of calculation for caster NPCs, use the single formula (you can do that just for NPCs by overriding this setting on their specific Mana Points item).
leveledProgression.extraManaTermsHint: append this box's contents to the calculation formula at every level ex. "+ 50" adds 50 extra mana or "* 1.5" increases mana by 50%. To reference a level there is a special notation: ex. "+ ATLEVEL[% @progression.classes.wizard.levels %] * 0.5" which adds 50% more for every wizard level you have
leveledProgression.sectionHint: The mana a character would have at any given caster level. You can use formulas, such as: '5+@attributes.spellmod', if you want to add the spellcasting modifier to the fixed number of mana points.
